blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,031 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing rain, highs of 34°F.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
